# Polymarket Search

Search engine for Polymarket prediction markets. Better ranking than Polymarket's built-in search (BM25 + volume + LLM-enriched aliases + fuzzy matching). Static site, data refreshes every 30 minutes.

## JSON API for agents

The same URL renders HTML for humans and JSON for agents. To get JSON, add `?format=json`:

```
https://aburkard.github.io/polymarket-search/?q=YOUR_QUERY&format=json
```

This requires a JS-capable fetcher (headless browser, Playwright, Puppeteer). The page replaces its body with a `<pre>` containing the JSON response. Plain `curl` won't work — use a browser tool.

### Parameters

- `q` (string, required) — search query. Supports typos, abbreviations, nicknames.
- `format=json` — return JSON instead of rendering UI.
- `limit` (int, default 20, max 100) — number of results.

### Response shape

```json
{
  "query": "canada",
  "count": 5,
  "results": [
    {
      "q": "Event title",
      "s": "event-slug",
      "ed": "2026-12-31",
      "im": "https://...image url",
      "v": 12345,
      "vt": 678901,
      "tg": ["Tag1", "Tag2"],
      "mc": 3,
      "mk": [
        {
          "l": "Outcome label",
          "op": [0.42, 0.58],
          "bid": 0.41,
          "ask": 0.43,
          "last": 0.42
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

Field reference:
- `q` — event title
- `s` — Polymarket event slug. URL: `https://polymarket.com/event/{slug}`
- `ed` — end date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- `im` — event image URL
- `v` — 24h volume in USD
- `vt` — total volume in USD
- `tg` — Polymarket-assigned tags
- `mc` — total markets in event
- `mk` — top 5 outcomes by relevance
- `op` — [yes_probability, no_probability]. Already normalized for mutually-exclusive events.
- `bid`, `ask`, `last` — order book and last trade prices (in dollars, 0-1)

## Data refresh

Index rebuilds every 30 minutes via GitHub Actions. Live prices for displayed results are also fetched from Polymarket's Gamma API on demand.

## Source

https://github.com/aburkard/polymarket-search
